mapper.select: { CALL GET_PROFESSOR_REVIEWS( #{professorUserId, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{courseId, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{division, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{semester, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sort, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{result, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{avgRating, mode=OUT, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{participationRate, mode=OUT, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{participantCount, mode=OUT, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{itemOverall, mode=OUT, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{itemContent, mode=OUT, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{itemWorkload, mode=OUT, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{itemKindness, mode=OUT, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{reviews, mode=OUT, jdbcType=CURSOR, javaType=java.sql.ResultSet, resultMap=com.example.backend.mapper.ProfessorReviewMapper.ProfessorReviewItemResultMap} ) }
